approach: Exact S_12 destroyed-label row-order quotient on the retained source-record-21 frozen order-30 boundary, followed by one source-blocked SAT model.

strategy.mechanism: Remove the non-invariant Hamming counter, sort the twelve 30-bit destroyed-to-core rows with exact lex CNF, block the row-sorted source vector, and permit one checked model.

hypothesis: The row-order quotient retains every boundary orbit, including tied rows, and one source-blocked production model can be classified without resuming labelled CEGAR.
discriminating_test: Exhaust all 2^21 four-core/three-destroyed labelled graphs and the four-bit comparator truth table, verify the row-sorted source against the regenerated no-Hamming CNF, then solve once with seed 1 for 30 seconds.

search_efficiency.naive_space: 2^426 labelled primary assignments in the fixed record-21 boundary; raw five-set generation touches 708162 five-sets.
search_efficiency.chosen_mechanism: Static nondecreasing row order with exact prefix-equality gadgets; retain all 66 internal destroyed edges and all 196998 raw Ramsey clauses.
search_efficiency.estimated_or_measured_savings: Exact primary count changes from 2^426 to 2^66*C(2^30+11,12), factor 479001570.5570708...; formula variables change from 155976 to 745 and clauses from 508157 to 198912 before the source block, but timing is not comparable because the Hamming restriction was removed.
search_efficiency.soundness_guard: General relabelling proof, exhaustive 2^21 tied-row coverage, all-auxiliary four-bit comparator truth table, independent physical-clause reconstruction, and an adversarial destroy transposition.

space_reduction.ambient_space: 2^861 labelled graphs on the fixed order-42 vertex set
space_reduction.represented_space_before: 2^426 boundary assignments after fixing 435 core edges
space_reduction.eliminated_or_quotiented: Destroyed-label S_12 copies distinguished only by the order of their 30-bit core rows
space_reduction.coverage_scope: One labelled frozen order-30 core from source record 21 and its 12 declared destroyed vertices
space_reduction.soundness_basis: Every completion is relabelled by sorting destroyed vertices; exhaustive tied-row control and independent adversarial audit check coverage and implementation.
space_reduction.remaining_unknown: Core automorphisms, alternative core embeddings, order-42 isomorphism classes, complete boundary solutions, and the global R(5,5) search remain uncounted.
space_reduction.next_bulk_elimination: A human-checkable raw-clause obstruction template for the certified two-orbit family, starting with one <=20-clause threshold test.

tactical_learning.prediction: Every small orbit retains a sorted representative; the source is a positive control; one post-block model will be exactly classifiable.
tactical_learning.observation: All controls passed; the one post-block model was supplied source record 12.
tactical_learning.surprise: The delegate's 175-clause comparator count was one too high; 174 clauses suffice and passed exhaustive truth-table and cold reconstruction.
tactical_learning.failure_signature: A sound label quotient still returns a different supplied class because it is not a class-level block.
tactical_learning.bottleneck_update: The boundary bottleneck is now compact isomorphism-class blocking/canonical augmentation, not destroy-label redundancy.

reusable_assets.name: record-21 lex quotient generator
reusable_assets.use: Generate the exact no-Hamming boundary CNF and exhaustive tied-row gate

reusable_assets.name: independent adversarial cold checker
reusable_assets.use: Reconstruct raw and lex clauses, check source/model semantics and target isomorphism

constraints_learned.constraint: The exact row-sorted primary count is 2^66*C(2^30+11,12), not 2^426/12! when row ties are allowed.
constraints_learned.scope: The fixed record-21 boundary primary universe
constraints_learned.evidence: Combinations-with-repetition count and exhaustive tied-row control

tactical_learning.next_discriminator: Deletion-minimize raw K5 clauses for one certified two-orbit UNSAT slice and stop if the first core exceeds 20 clauses.

prior_art_check.exact_delta: A static, explicitly coverage-checked S_12 boundary quotient; not a new construction or class-exclusion mechanism.
prior_art_check.duplicate_risk: The SAT model may merely rediscover another of the historically supplied 656 classes; it did, yielding source record 12.
prior_art_check.comparison_test: Use the row-sorted source as the required positive control, block it once, and classify exactly one subsequent model.

field_progress_assessment.contribution_class: verified local symmetry reduction and research software
field_progress_assessment.closest_prior_result: Historical common-subgraph neighbourhood searches returned only the supplied 656 graphs; the previous local run had 64 labelled vectors and eight row normal forms.
field_progress_assessment.measurable_improvement: Exact 479001570.5570708... reduction of labelled primary assignments in one fixed-core boundary; no class or Ramsey-bound improvement.
field_progress_assessment.independent_validation: Independent Python/NetworkX cold checker passed; two full graph checkers agreed.
field_progress_assessment.remains_unproved: No new order-42 class, K43 witness, boundary exclusion, corpus completeness, or R(5,5) bound.
field_progress_assessment.route_recommendation: redirect to proof-core compression because further individual boundary blocks lack a field-progress path.

summary: The quotient and its tied-row coverage are sound, but the one source-blocked model is supplied source record 12. The exact local reduction is retained; boundary search stops.
rationale: The exhaustive and independent controls establish the quotient, while exact class membership triggers the predeclared stop and prevents a novelty or exclusion claim.
claims: The row-sorted quotient covers every S_12 destroy-label orbit in the fixed record-21 boundary.
The one post-block model is valid and isomorphic to supplied source record 12.
next_steps: Run the first-core <=20-clause discriminator for strategy-r55-two-orbit-proof-compression.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260721-172006-427f4a: production gate passed; one SAT model in 4.849 seconds
independent_checker: checkers/novel42_lex_quotient_audit.py independently reconstructs 196998 raw clauses and all 11 lex gadgets, checks all 198913 clauses, validates clique numbers and target isomorphism, and attacks the quotient with a destroy-label transposition.
transfer_insights: Group-action canonicalization -> row sorting should preserve at least one representative even with ties -> exhaustive S_3 controls and the S_12 source/control audit passed.

established_facts.claim: The record-21 boundary row quotient is covering and has exact represented size 2^66*C(2^30+11,12).
established_facts.evidence: Production and independent adversarial cold reports.

established_facts.claim: The one post-block model is a valid supplied source-record-12 graph.
established_facts.evidence: Dual exact checkers, DIMACS evaluation, nauty, and NetworkX.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Continue the same quotient formula with an arbitrary larger individual-normal-form cutoff.
ruled_out.scope: This record-21 fixed core and primary-vector blocks.
ruled_out.reason: The quotient is not a class block and the first post-source-block model is another supplied class.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A proved class-level block/canonical augmentation, an artifact defect, or a field-gate-justified bounded experiment.

open_leads.description: Compress a certified two-orbit exclusion into a raw K5-clause theorem.
open_leads.rationale: A <=20-clause first core is the cheapest discriminator for the named structural-theorem gate.
open_leads.next_experiment: Deletion-minimize one raw clause set with exact UNSAT checks and independently verify five-set origins.

blocker: No sound compact isomorphism-class block or canonical augmentation exists for the boundary.
reopen_condition: Provide a proved class-level block/canonical augmentation, or demonstrate a source, mapping, comparator, or checker defect.
reopen_evidence: The previous labelled-block strategy's symmetry-quotient condition was satisfied by this exhaustive quotient packet; the remaining blocker is class-level, not label-level.

continuation.objective: Test whether one certified two-orbit exclusion has a raw core of at most 20 clauses.
continuation.first_action: Strip one retained burden-zero slice to raw K5 clauses and run exact deletion minimization with independent origin mapping.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop on a core larger than 20 clauses, origin-map failure, or non-replayable UNSAT; only then consider all 20 distances.

campaign_assessment.reason: One different bounded structural discriminator remains cheap and has an explicit theorem-level acceptance threshold.

strategy_proposals.family: proof-core compression for structured Ramsey exclusions
strategy_proposals.mechanism: Deletion-minimize raw K5 clauses and canonicalize signed incidence cores across the 20 certified two-orbit slices.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: The first core has at most 20 clauses and all slices may collapse to at most five templates.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Test the <=20-clause threshold on one slice before building an atlas.
strategy_proposals.rationale: It redirects from more known-class sampling toward a possible human structural lemma.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can destroy-label symmetry be removed soundly from one exact order-42 frozen-core Ramsey boundary?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: An exact local quotient with exhaustive tied-row coverage and an independent adversarial checker.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: Accept only the scoped quotient count and checker packet; reject any class, boundary, or Ramsey-bound claim.

closest_prior_work.difference: Historical common-subgraph searches did not provide this local CNF quotient packet or tied-row coverage certificate.

novelty_searches.source: Dynamic Survey and McKay-Radziszowski primary paper
novelty_searches.query: R(5,5) order-42 common-subgraph search and current bound
novelty_searches.finding: The exact value remains open; historical methods already make known-class rediscovery a control only.

external_channel.acceptance_path: No external submission is justified for this local infrastructure result.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol was principal investigator; supplied GPT-5.6 Terra literature-strategy and experiment-verification delegates were advisory. Sol independently audited sources, corrected the comparator count, implemented and ran the experiment, and wrote the cold checker. Tools: Python 3.12.3, GCC 13.3.0, CaDiCaL 1.7.3, nauty labelg, NetworkX 3.3, curl, pdftotext, jq, SHA-256, and the computational-researcher experiment harness. No new subagent, CAS, proof assistant, external publication, remote account, or system change was used.
